page: OVHcloud b3-512 is a general-purpose server powered by an AMD EPYC processor with x86_64 architecture. It features 128 dedicated physical cores running at a base clock speed of 2.3 GHz, with one thread per core. The system is equipped with 512.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced memory-to-core ratio of 4.0 GB per core. Local storage consists of a 400 GB NVMe SSD, and the instance includes a baseline network bandwidth of 20 Gbps alongside one complimentary public IPv4 address.

Benchmark results highlight exceptional multi-core capabilities. The server achieves top-tier performance in multi-core stress-ng, Geekbench multi-core, and Passmark CPU tests. Memory performance is also highly rated, with top-tier read-only small block memory bandwidth and strong large-block read and write bandwidth. In real-world processing tasks, it delivers top-tier results in software compilation, ray tracing, and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression. However, single-threaded performance is comparatively moderate, with average results in gzip compression and bzip3 decompression.

While the server excels at parallel processing and memory-intensive operations, it exhibits limitations in specific workloads. For instance, LLM inference text generation with a large 70B model is rated as poor, although prompt processing for the same model remains strong. The lack of a dedicated GPU restricts its utility for heavy deep learning training. This hardware profile is highly cost-efficient for resource-dense, highly parallelized workloads. It is best suited for large-scale database operations, software compilation, static web serving, and multi-threaded data processing.
description: The OVHcloud b3-512 is a general-purpose server built on the x86_64 architecture, featuring 128 dedicated AMD EPYC physical cores running at 2.3 GHz. It is equipped with 512.0 GB of RAM, a 400 GB NVMe SSD, and 20 Gbps of baseline network bandwidth. The server delivers top-tier multi-core performance, as evidenced by outstanding results in multi-threaded decompression, software compilation, and memory bandwidth tests. While single-threaded performance and large-scale LLM text generation represent relative bottlenecks, its massive parallel processing capacity makes it highly cost-efficient for resource-dense environments. This server is optimized for multi-threaded data processing, large-scale database operations, static web serving, and software compilation.
og_description: OVHcloud b3-512 is a general-purpose server featuring 128 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 512 GB RAM, and a 400 GB NVMe SSD, delivering top-tier multi-core performance for parallel workloads.
meta_description: OVHcloud b3-512 is a general-purpose KVM server featuring 128 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 512 GB RAM, and 20 Gbps network bandwidth.
tagline: A high-core-density general-purpose server featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processors and NVMe storage for demanding parallel workloads.
bullet_points: 128 dedicated AMD EPYC physical cores with 512 GB RAM
400 GB local NVMe SSD and 20 Gbps baseline network bandwidth
Top-tier multi-core CPU and memory bandwidth performance
Strong capabilities in software compilation and database operations
Best suited for highly parallelized workloads and static web serving
